name: get_drc_ruledecks
short_description: Get a list of DRC rule deck objects
full_help:
get_drc_ruledecks

Description: 
Get a list of DRC rule deck objects

Syntax: 
get_drc_ruledecks  [-of_objects <args>] [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>]
                   [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
drc_ruledeck

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-of_objects]  Get 'drc_ruledeck' objects of these types: 'rule_check'.
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match the 'drc_ruledeck' objects against patterns.
                 Default: *

Categories: 
DRC, Object

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
Suspend message limits during command execution
